Sticky..name: Sticky.
Sticky..description: Grapples target on hit. Can Grapple any number of creatures. When crit: release 1 creature (attacker's choice).

Confounding Pheromones..name: Confounding Pheromones.
Confounding Pheromones..description:
Enemies make a DC 15 WIL save at the start of their turns or Confused this turn. Gain advantage 1 on the save for each failure this encounter.

(Confused. The GM Spends your next action)

Swarm..name: Swarm.
Swarm..description: When damaged, decrement the damage die then summon 1 minion (small -> d4, tiny -> dead).

Shoot Web..name: Shoot Web.

(Range 6) 1d8+2. On hit: Restrained

(escape DC 12, or any slashing/fire damage).

Crush..name: Crush.

Web Garrote..name: Web Garrote.
Web Garrote..description:
1d8+2. On hit: Grappled (escape DC 13), Silenced until target escapes.

(Silenced. Cannot cast spells or use other abilities that require speaking (e.g. Commander's Orders).)

Mutual Harm..name: Mutual Harm.
Mutual Harm..description: You take half damage from attacks while grappling a creature (they take the other half).

Horrifying Wail..description: DC 16 WIL save, or creatures within 6 spaces are Frightened and must spend 1 Action moving as far away as possible.

Trap!.name: Trap!
Trap!.description: When an enemy moves adjacent to you or an ally, they trigger one of your traps! (1/encounter each).

Deal 5d4 damage (doesn't miss). Half as

much to ALL adjacent creatures.

CLANG!.description: Allies who hear your clanging, roll 1 additional die whenever they attack.

Putrid Cloud..name: Putrid Cloud.
Putrid Cloud..description: On Death: 2d6 poison damage to enemies within Reach 2.

Infernal Allure..name: Infernal Allure.
Infernal Allure..description: At the start of their turn, heroes make a DC 15 WIL save or become Allured (GM spends 1 of your Actions). Gain advantage for each failure this encounter.

Doomclaw (2×)..name: Doomclaw (2×).
Doomclaw (2×)..description: (Reach 2) 3d6+10. On damage: Grappled (escape DC 17). If the same creature is Grappled by both of the glabrezu's claws, it must escape from each of them separately. OR

Tear Asunder..name: Tear Asunder.
Tear Asunder..description: (A creature Grappled by both of the glabrezu's claws) 50 unpreventable damage. If the target is at 0 HP: DC 17 STR save or be torn in two, dying instantly.

Savage..name: Savage.
Savage..description: Always crits when attacking a Grappled creature.

Regenerate..name: Regenerate.
Regenerate..description: Does not die at 0 HP. Only fire, radiant, or a crit while at 0 HP can kill it.

Pluck Up..name: Pluck Up.
Pluck Up..description: (Reach 4, target up to 2 creatures) 3d12+20. On hit: Grappled (escape DC 18), OR

Crush & Drop..name: Crush & Drop.
Crush & Drop..description: Fly upward 20 spaces, deal 20 damage to Grappled creatures, then release (10d6 fall damage).

Fly & Drop..name: Fly & Drop.
Fly & Drop..description: (if grappling) Fly upward 12 and release (6d6 fall damage).

Burst Forth!.name: Burst Forth!
Burst Forth!.description: Combat with a Bulette starts with the heaviest character making a DC 14 DEX save or they are Grappled (escape DC 14) and take 1d12+20 damage (half on save).

Drag Below..name: Drag Below.
Drag Below..description: (A Grappled creature) 2d12 then drag below and burrow away. OR

Leap & Bite..name: Leap & Bite.
Leap & Bite..description: (If not grappling) leap 6, and attack for 1d12+20. On hit: Grappled.

Panic..name: Panic.
Panic..description: Attacks are made against Pinky with disadvantage.

Escape..name: Escape.
Escape..description: (Reaction: when Bloodied) Use Cloak of Lesser Windform to turn Invisible and run away.

Haha, Missed Me!.name: Haha, Missed Me!
Haha, Missed Me!.description: Whenever an attack misses you, deal 1 psychic damage in return.

Haha, Missed Me!.name: Haha, Missed Me!
Haha, Missed Me!.description: Whenever an attack misses you, deal 1 psychic damage in return.

Beastshift..name: Beastshift.
Beastshift..description: +4 speed, gain Medium armor this round. 4d4+10, OR

Hurricane..name: Hurricane.
Hurricane..description: (Reach 3) 4d4+10 to all enemies within reach. On damage: move targets anywhere else in Reach.

Flesh to Stone..name: Flesh to Stone.
Flesh to Stone..description: Creatures Dazed by the Basilisk remain so for 10 minutes. Dazed 3 times = Petrified.
